description: Can view the users list/table

description: Can search and filter users

description: Can view detailed user information in modal

description: Can create new Admin/Staff user accounts

description: Can edit user information (Admin/Staff only)

description: Can delete user accounts

name: Approve User
description: Can approve pending user registrations

name: Reject User
description: Can reject pending user registrations

name: Reset User Password
description: Can reset user passwords

description: Can generate temporary passwords for users

name: Export Users
description: Can export user data to CSV/Excel

description: Can view the reports list/table

description: Can view detailed report information in modal

description: Can view reporter details (name, role, location)

description: Can view uploaded evidence photos

name: View Staff Remarks
description: Can read staff remarks and notes on reports

description: Can change report status from Pending to In Progress

description: Can mark reports as Resolved

name: Reject Report
description: Can reject reports

description: Can add staff remarks/notes to reports

description: Can filter reports by status (Pending, In Progress, Resolved, Rejected)

description: Can filter reports by priority level

name: Export Reports
description: Can export reports to PDF/Excel

name: View Routes Management Module
description: Can access the Routes Management page for garbage collection routes

name: View Routes List
description: Can view the routes list/table

name: Search Routes
description: Can search and filter routes by name, municipality, status

name: View Route Details
description: Can view detailed route information and statistics

name: View Route on Map
description: Can view route visualization on interactive map

name: View Route Waypoints
description: Can view waypoints (start, pickup points, end) of a route

name: Create Route
description: Can create new garbage collection routes with waypoints

name: Add Waypoint to Route
description: Can add pickup points/waypoints to a route

name: Edit Route
description: Can edit route details (name, description, waypoints)

name: Delete Route
description: Can delete routes permanently

name: Change Route Status
description: Can activate or deactivate routes

name: View Route Statistics
description: Can view route distance, duration, and performance metrics

name: Export Routes Data
description: Can export routes data to file

name: Switch Map Style
description: Can switch between different map styles (Standard, Satellite, Topo)

description: Can access the Collection Schedules page

name: View Weekly Overview
description: Can view weekly schedule overview

name: View Calendar View
description: Can view schedules in calendar/monthly view

name: Switch View Mode
description: Can toggle between List and Calendar view modes

name: View Schedule Details
description: Can view detailed schedule information in modal

name: Bulk Create Schedules
description: Can create multiple schedules (specific dates, week, month)

name: Edit Schedule
description: Can edit existing schedules (route, date, time)

name: Cancel Schedule
description: Can cancel schedules with reason

name: Reactivate Schedule
description: Can reactivate cancelled or completed schedules

name: Mark Schedule as Completed
description: Can mark schedules as completed

name: Filter Schedules by Day
description: Can filter schedules by day of the week
